name: casper-studios
description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for business automation, data analysis, and productivity

plugins.name: casper
plugins.description: Context management for consulting projects - company info, project PRDs, meeting transcripts

plugins.name: data-analysis
plugins.description: Data analysis and storytelling for financial and RevOps contexts

plugins.name: dev-toolkit
plugins.description: A collection of skills for automating common development workflows like planning, committing, and code review.

plugins.name: stack-patterns
plugins.description: A collection of skills that teach idiomatic patterns and conventions for popular libraries and frameworks.

plugins.name: cf-saas-stack
plugins.description: Cloudflare Workers + React Router v7 + tRPC + D1/Drizzle + Better Auth conventions and commands for building SaaS applications on the edge
